title: Calculation in the number column
excerpt:
It would be convenient to be able to enter a simple formula in a calculation field and get the result (with of course loss of the formula). 
More convenient than using a calculator and retyping the result.

posts.author: YannD (Yann Dehuy)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be convenient to be able to enter a simple formula in a calculation field and get the result (with of course loss of the formula).

posts.author: mentality317 (Matthew)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be tremendously helpful with many folks and their workflows!
